text.content:
Injuries • Poison • Chromatic Conundrum

Injury Card

Chromatic Conundrum

The character's skin starts changing colors randomly, as if affected by a magical poison. Each hue change comes with a wave of weakness and dizziness.

Colorful Chaos
Treatment

Seek the help of an alchemist to create a potion that can stabilize the effects and reverse the poison's influence.

Details

  • Category: Poison

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 12 Hit Points

  • Duration: Permanent

  • Status Effect: Poisoned

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Poison

  • odds: 1

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Chromatic Conundrum

  • imagetitle: Colorful Chaos

  • image: icons/consumables/potions/bottle-conical-corked-labeled-skull-poison-green.webp

  • description: The character's skin starts changing colors randomly, as if affected by a magical poison. Each hue change comes with a wave of weakness and dizziness.

  • treatment: Seek the help of an alchemist to create a potion that can stabilize the effects and reverse the poison's influence.

  • severity: Major

  • damage: 12

  • duration: 0

  • action: Apply the Poison Injury

  • statuseffect: Poisoned

Injuries • Poison • Mystical Mosquito Bites

Injury Card

Mystical Mosquito Bites

The character is plagued by mystical mosquito bites that never seem to heal, leaving behind glowing welts that attract other insects.

Tiny Troublemakers
Treatment

Use a special salve made of rare herbs and arcane ingredients to soothe the bites and prevent further infestation.

Details

  • Category: Poison

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 400

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • treatment: Use a special salve made of rare herbs and arcane ingredients to soothe the bites and prevent further infestation.

  • damage: 7

  • duration: 2400

  • statuseffect: none

Injuries • Poison • Serpentine Sibilant Speaking

Injury Card

Serpentine Sibilant Speaking

Your words now sound like a hissing serpent, which may cause misunderstandings during negotiations

Words Of Wisdom Worms
Treatment

Speak only in rhymes for a full moon cycle

Details

  • Category: Poison

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 11 Hit Points

  • Duration: 100

  • Status Effect: Charmed

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Poison • Sneaky Sneeze Syndrome

Injury Card

Sneaky Sneeze Syndrome

You were hit by a mischievous druid's sneeze spell. Your sneezes are now random and may cause embarrassing situations

Cough Of Confusion
Treatment

Drink a special tea made from four rare herbs found in a hidden glade

Details

  • Category: Poison

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 30

  • Status Effect: Blind

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Poison • Toadstool Toenails

Injury Card

Toadstool Toenails

The character's toenails have mysteriously transformed into tiny toadstools, causing mild discomfort and a musty smell that repels insects.

Mushroom Mayhem
Treatment

Apply a soothing cream made of rare mushroom spores to prevent further fungal growth.

Details

  • Category: Poison

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 200

  • Status Effect: none

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Poison • Toxic Toenail Trouble

Injury Card

Toxic Toenail Trouble

Your big toenail has taken on a life of its own and may cause uncontrollable tap-dancing at awkward times

Foot Funk Fiasco
Treatment

Trim the nail under the light of a full moon, while singing a lullaby

Details

  • Category: Poison

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 20

  • Status Effect: none

Injuries • Poison • Venomous Hiccup Syndrom

Injury Card

Venomous Hiccup Syndrom

The character periodically suffers from venomous hiccups, causing small spurts of toxic gas to escape with each hiccup.

Unusual Belching
Treatment

Consume a concoction of herbal extracts to neutralize the venom and control the hiccups.

Details

  • Category: Poison

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 4 Hit Points

  • Duration: 250

  • Status Effect: Poisoned

Your eyes now perceive everything as if it's made of creepy crawlies. Try not to scream
